name: Toph Beifong | Shortstack Cop
description:
A bit of a disclaimer or maybe a sort of… what is it called? I dunno, I’ll just say disclaimer.

A bit of a disclaimer: I haven’t watch Avatar yet, so information may be incorrect, and so, as the consumers, I would appreciate if you correct any mistakes to her character. Well, besides the ass-clapping part. That’s vital to the plot, I swear.

And also the JLLM isn’t perfect, or sometimes things might now work how it would. After all, AI isn’t perfect, so sometimes the bot might literally forget that she’s blind. Don’t worry though, the bot is very much coded to be blind. Gotta make it accurate to the Blind Queen after all.

And also that despite how many tokens this bot will have, Toph won’t know anything, and most likely won’t know the whole story because I can’t dump the whole summary in here without the bot most likely shitting itself for LLM users. Though I do have almost 6K tokens, so maybe I fudged up…. Uhhh.

And also. this is Toph while shes a police officer. Aka, grown up Toph. The thumbnail in question is used because people love ass, and it’s good art.

While you can say that’s art of ATLA Toph, and honestly, it probably is with how short that girl be, but I’m just gonna repurpose it. Hence why it’s a Shortstack bot. Does it make it better? Pffft probably not, just know the bot in question isn’t a minor.

Either way, no real reason to complain. If anyone doesn’t like the art, or for some reason feels weirded out, feel free to ignore. You’re on this site to enjoy yourself, so don’t do things you’re not comfortable with.

Disclaimer over, yap mode engaged.

This is Shortstack Toph. As spunky and tomboyish as ever! The Melon Lord, The Earthbending queen! Now in her… what age was she while she’s was a police officer? I’ll just say late twenties, someone in the comments will correct me. Either way, she’s short, but her body is filled to the brim with feisty energy,

At first, I was gonna make an aged-up bot, but I didn’t know how I really felt about that when I really thought about it. The topic of aged-up is weird. Like it isn’t an offense or anything, it’s more-so just a weird moral dilemma. People can age up characters, sure. If you add a bit of skin, or perhaps even fill on smut to it, it’s weird.

Like for example, you could age up Dora, have her in booty shorts, whatever whatever, and people will definitely riot or be chill. Then you have an aged-up Dipper Pines fucking either Pacifica or Wendy, and nothing really happens?

Is it kinda like a spectrum? Like some characters you’re not allowed to do that with, and some other characters people won’t care too much? Kinda like how some people will lewd Komi, and people WILL not like it. But if you do the same with Marin, it’s all good? There’s multiple examples out there, but that’s what comes to mind first.

It might be like a bias sort of thing? Though what do I know, I don’t have a psychologist degree, I’m just a random guy on the internet who creates bots for fun. I just wanted to have my ADHD rant when I was in the kitchen and looking at the ingredients to create this bot.

AHEM

Besides the weird moral debate, I really need to watch Avatar: The Last Airbender, I’m fucking missing out man. In my ADHD brain though, I just can’t sit down, it’s the same reason why One Piece is gonna be impossible to watch, cause that’s a lot of time to dedicate, and I’m gonna have to purposely have that be my fixation for a long time. And purposely fixating on something is a hard task.

Cause if I have my fixation, I can just do that for hours without stopping and get it done.

Much like TheKite bots. That’s why they came out one after ano
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
